summary: Frontend-only verification for CrimsonMC three fixes: logo visibility, IP copy buttons, and Refund Policy page/routing. All 7 requested items PASSED.
verified_items: copy-ip-btn click succeeds and success toast appears
copy-ip-btn-2 present in Live Server section and clickable
nav-refund-link and footer-refund-link both present; nav link routes to /refund
/refund renders refund-policy-page with title 'Refund Policy' and refund-48hr section stating 48-hour full refund on ranks
Direct navigation to /refund (fresh load) renders correctly (SPA route works)
critical_code_review_comments: Two harmless console 401s observed on page load (likely a background API/health call). Not blocking; consider silencing or fixing whichever endpoint returns 401 for anonymous users.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three fixes (logo, copy IP x2, Refund Policy page + routing) verified working via Playwright at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Only minor observation: two 401 errors in console from an unrelated resource load; not blocking any user flow.
